creator: dominique.goncalves@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

On Mon, Dec 15, 2008 at 5:30 PM, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of sysutils/gnomebaker,
>
> Please note that PR ports/129648 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/129648
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>

Patch approved,
Thanks!

-- 
There's this old saying: "Give a man a fish, feed him for a day. Teach
a man to fish, feed him for life."
